mapper.sql: id, backup_name, file_name, file_path, file_size, backup_status, start_time, end_time, cost_time, operator_id, operator_name, error_message, remark, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_data_backup WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

SELECT FROM sys_data_backup
ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_data_backup (backup_name, file_name, file_path, file_size, backup_status, start_time, end_time, cost_time, operator_id, operator_name, error_message, remark) VALUES (#{backupName}, #{fileName}, #{filePath}, #{fileSize}, #{backupStatus}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{costTime}, #{operatorId}, #{operatorName}, #{errorMessage}, #{remark})
mapper.update:
UPDATE sys_data_backup
backup_name = #{backupName}, file_name = #{fileName}, file_path = #{filePath}, file_size = #{fileSize}, backup_status = #{backupStatus}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, cost_time = #{costTime}, operator_id = #{operatorId}, operator_name = #{operatorName}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, remark = #{remark}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_data_backup SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
